creator: eb30750@gmail.com
text:
The Flash box in the upper right side of this webpage is garbled.

http://www.usatoday.com/money/index?refresh=1

Fix: 

Most likely one of these packages

BRSINC-BSDHST# pkg_info | grep swfdec
swfdec-0.8.4_3      Flash Rendering Library
swfdec-gnome-2.30.1 Gtk flash player and thumbnailer
swfdec-plugin-0.8.2_3 Flash rendering plugin
How-To-Repeat: use browser to display listed webpage link
